narrative:
Pataskala 2-B (precinct in Licking County) has 1,402 registered voters, with 63.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.1%, a modest Republican lean of 2.6 percentage points.
